questions.text: Which of these is a renewable source of energy?
questions.explanation: Solar energy is renewable as it is continuously available from the sun. Coal, petroleum, and natural gas are non-renewable fossil fuels.

questions.text: Conservation of natural resources is important for sustainable development.
questions.explanation: Conservation of natural resources ensures their availability for future generations and supports sustainable development.

questions.text: What is the main cause of depletion of groundwater?
questions.correctAnswer: Overuse for irrigation, industrial use, and domestic consumption.
questions.explanation: Groundwater depletion is mainly caused by excessive extraction for irrigation, industrial processes, and increasing domestic water demand.

questions.text: The process of collecting and storing rainwater is called ________ harvesting.
questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting is the collection and storage of rainwater for later use, helping conserve water resources.
